# Q3 comp values + fields + sort (lateral movement rdp)

**Dataset**: `gx_06_rdp` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

RDP lateral-movement hunting — remote-desktop connection patterns across hosts. Q3 comp values + fields + sort.

```sql
dataset = gx_06_rdp | comp values(dst_host) as hosts_list, count(dst_host) as sessions by user | fields user, sessions, hosts_list | sort desc sessions
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 5). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
